title: Orbiting Tile Progress
prompt:
Create a production-ready Orbiting Tile Progress loader using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. The loader shows a small violet tile moving around a square route while three completed route tiles remain quiet, communicating that a report is being assembled. Place the motion inside a white Bento card on #F4F5F6 with a #ECECEE border, 22px corner radius, soft neutral shadow, #111111 primary text, and #4A4A4F supporting text. Violet is the only bright accent. The card itself must not have a gradient.

Treat this as a meaningful loading status rather than decoration. Use role=status with an aria-live polite label that states “Assembling report, step two of four.” The path must not be the sole source of progress: include the textual step count and a labelled pause/resume button with a 44px target. Clicking, Enter, and Space pause or resume the orbit; aria-pressed reflects the paused state. Let the tile travel on a four-corner keyframe route over 1.6 seconds with linear easing, while the pause control lifts 2px over 180ms and compresses 1px over 90ms. A clear dark focus ring and AA contrast are required.

Fit cleanly at 320px and allow detail previews to scale without viewport-fixed positioning. The motion should use transform only. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by showing the tile at its second checkpoint and keeping the label current. Avoid timers, remote assets, random data, browser storage, network calls, and dynamic code. Provide complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-orbit-loader{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111}.uiwiki-orbit-loader i{display:block;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:8px;background:#7c3aed;animation:uiwiki-orbit 1.6s linear infinite}@keyframes uiwiki-orbit{25%{transform:translate(58px,0)}50%{transform:translate(58px,58px)}75%{transform:translate(0,58px)}}.uiwiki-orbit-loader button{min-height:44px;margin-top:12px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-orbit-loader button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-orbit-loader i{animation:none;transform:translate(58px,58px)}}
